Dashboard.subtitle: Track your progress and continue your learning journey.

Dashboard.learningPlanDesc: Continue your structured learning path and track daily goals.

Dashboard.insightsDesc: Advanced analytics for your learning journey.
Dashboard.leaderboardsDesc: Compete with other learners in your field.
Dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Resume your last lesson with one click.

Chat.title: AI Advisor

Chat.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
Chat.intro: Ask me about course recommendations, skill development, or how to reach your career goals.
Chat.suggestDataScience: How to start in Data Science?
Chat.aiPoweredNote: AI-powered suggestions based on your profile and goals.

Plan.startGenerating: Start by generating your first personalized learning path.
Plan.defineGoals: Define your goals and learning preferences.

validation.goalMinLength: Goal must be at least 5 characters

Plan.transcriptNote: Upload your transcript (.html) to help the AI skip courses you've already completed.
Plan.notFound: No learning plan found. Go to the dashboard to generate one.
Plan.noMaterials: No specific materials provided for this course yet.
Plan.askAnythingAboutLesson: Ask me anything about this lesson.
Plan.tutorWelcomeMessage: I'm your AI tutor anchored to this lesson. You asked: "{text}". Here is my helpful response based on the lesson text.
Plan.execSuccessNoOutput: Code executed successfully. No output returned.
